title: Smoke Test Builder
why_this_exists: This quest came from: Project Analysis: FieldSeed. The skill being practiced is: Testing. Your stated blocker is: KDT OS detected Testing in this uploaded project and created a ready practice quest. This quest exists so practice connects back to something you care about instead of becoming random homework.
goal: Practice proving a project still runs after changes.
what_to_build: Add a tiny tests folder to a project and create at least one test that proves the app imports or starts.
requirements: Import the app or main module

teach_me_breakdown.label: What is this skill?
teach_me_breakdown.answer: Testing is a skill KDT OS can practice through small exact quests.

teach_me_breakdown.label: Why practice it?
teach_me_breakdown.answer: Practicing it in a tiny project makes it easier to use later in a larger project.

resume_rule: After this quest is complete, return to the original project or goal that caused this quest unless you intentionally choose a different path.
